name: Scte35SpliceInsertScheduleActionSettings
description: Settings for a SCTE-35 splice_insert message.

allOf.description: Optional, the duration for the splice_insert, in 90 KHz ticks. To convert seconds to ticks, multiple the seconds by 90,000. If you enter a duration, there is an expectation that the downstream system can read the duration and cue in at that time. If you do not enter a duration, the splice_insert will continue indefinitely and there is an expectation that you will enter a return_to_network to end the splice_insert at the appropriate time.
The splice_event_id for the SCTE-35 splice_insert, as defined in SCTE-35.
